visualStyle: storybook watercolor with soft evening light

scenes.label: Opening scene
scenes.narrativePurpose: Establish the protagonist, central goal, and first pressure.
scenes.prompt: A storybook watercolor illustration of the protagonist entering the story's primary setting, with the core conflict visible in the environment, cinematic composition, no text.
scenes.negativePrompt: text, watermark, logo, modern props that violate canon, extra limbs, distorted face
